creator: amendlik@gmail.com
text:
(In reply to Cy Schubert from comment #22)

I'm having some trouble understanding these log messages. Is this from the client or the server? It seems like you are providing evidence that sshd works fine with encryption type 20 if the ticket was issued from a FreeBSD KDC, but if the ticket was issued by FreeIPA, it says encryption type 20 is not supported.

Is that correct? I could understand if it could not process an improperly formed ticket. But messages saying "type 20 is not supported" and "type 20 works fine" from the same server doesn't make much sense.
